settings.label: Newsletter
settings.heading: Join our newsletter.
settings.description: Subscribe for early access to new collections, seasonal updates, and exclusive offers.
settings.note: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe at any time.

settings.label: 01 / Member updates
settings.title: Subscriber-only news
settings.description: Quiet updates about new arrivals, restocks, and pieces about to retire — sent only when there is something worth saying.

settings.label: 02 / Early access
settings.title: First in line
settings.description: Preview new collections days before they're released to the public — with the option to reserve before anyone else.

settings.label: 03 / Member offers
settings.title: Exclusive offers
settings.description: Occasional member-only offers and seasonal savings, shared first with subscribers and never advertised elsewhere.
A quiet list of what lands in your inbox when you join us — nothing noisy, always useful.

settings.label: Questions?
settings.heading: Prefer the direct line?
settings.description: Reach out to our team anytime — we're happy to walk you through the collection or answer any questions.
